digest.en: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests remain high in 2025 amid pressure on US campuses. The US has issued more Iran sanctions on the eve of possible talks in Pakistan. Trump extended the Iran ceasefire, with the Hormuz blockade set to continue.
digest.hi: भारत के रक्षा मंत्री राजनाथ सिंह ने जर्मनी में होर्मुज जलसंधि में बढ़ती अस्थिरता पर चिंता जताई। उन्होंने कहा कि इस क्षेत्र में तनाव का भारत पर सीधा असर पड़ेगा। ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच तनाव बढ़ रहा है, जिससे क्षेत्रीय सुरक्षा को खतरा हो सकता है।

articles.title: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests stay high in 2025 amid US campus pressure
articles.summary: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests remained high in 2025 amid US campus pressure. Legal aid group says the rate of requests shows pro-Palestine advocacy persists despite Trump administration's tactics. Pro-Palestine legal aid requests stay high in 2025 amid US campus pressure.

articles.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire With Iran
articles.summary: Trump extended a cease-fire with Iran at Pakistan's request. The pause in hostilities had been set to expire within hours. The president said Pakistan, which is trying to mediate an end to the war, requested he hold off any attacks.

articles.title: Nearly 8,000 people died or disappeared on migration routes in 2025: IOM
articles.summary: Nearly 8,000 people died or disappeared on migration routes in 2025. More than four in every 10 deaths and disappearances occurred on sea routes to Europe, UN agency says.

articles.title: US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan
articles.summary: The US issued sanctions on 14 Iranian individuals and entities. The Trump administration targets 14 individuals and entities over alleged links to Iran's arms industry. US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan.

articles.title: Trump Is Said to Be in Talks to Send Afghans Who Aided U.S. Forces to Congo
articles.summary: Trump is in talks to send Afghans who aided US forces to the Democratic Republic of Congo. A U. S. aid worker said that the Afghans, who were evacuated to Qatar, would face a choice between moving to the Democratic Republic of Congo and living under the Taliban.

articles.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue
articles.summary: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire until a proposal is submitted. The Hormuz blockade will continue. Trump says extending ceasefire until Iranian proposal is submitted and discussions are concluded. Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue.

articles.title: EU eyes options as Iran conflict threatens jet fuel shortages
articles.summary: Europe faces jet fuel shortages due to the Hormuz blockade. Imports are heavily relied upon. The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is causing concern in Europe, which relies heavily on imported jet fuel.

articles.title: Sudan refugees returning home face new ‘struggle for survival’: UN
articles.summary: Sudanese returnees face damaged homes and limited access to water and healthcare. Returnees find chronic need for investment with homes, water supplies, health provision, electricity 'heavily damaged'. Sudan refugees returning home face new ‘struggle for survival’: UN.

articles.title: Trump says he will extend ceasefire with Iran until negotiations conclude
articles.summary: US-Iran peace talks are uncertain as the ceasefire deadline approaches. Live updates: Uncertainty swirls around US-Iran peace talks as ceasefire deadline looms CNN. Live updates: Trump says he will extend ceasefire with Iran until negotiations conclude CNN.

articles.title: Trump announces Iran ceasefire extension but says blockade remains
articles.summary: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire until leaders propose a unified plan to end the war. US president says attacks will be held off until Iranian leaders 'come up with a unified proposal' to end war.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire as uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace talks remains
articles.summary: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire amid uncertainty over US-Iran peace talks. Live Updates: Trump extends ceasefire as uncertainty over U. S.-Iran peace talks remains CBS News.

articles.title: Germany, Italy block bid to suspend EU-Israel trade agreement
articles.summary: Germany and Italy blocked the EU from suspending its association agreement with Israel. The move halted a proposed suspension. Germany and Italy have blocked the European Union from suspending the bloc’s association agreement with Israel.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire in Iran, citing 'seriously fractured' Iranian government
articles.summary: Trump extended a ceasefire in Iran citing a fractured government. The extension was announced by Trump. Trump extends ceasefire in Iran, citing 'seriously fractured' Iranian government CNBC.

articles.title: U.S. Turns Up Pressure on Iraq to Distance Itself From Iran
articles.summary: The US is pressuring Iraq to dismantle Iran-backed militias. These militias have attacked Americans and US sites. Washington is demanding that the Baghdad government dismantle Iran-backed Iraqi militias that have been attacking Americans and U. S.

articles.title: Iran threatens To End Gulf Nations' Oil Production As Truce Deadline Nears
articles.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards threatened to end Gulf nations' oil production. The threat was made as a truce deadline nears. Iran's Revolutionary Guards on Tuesday threatened to end oil production in the Middle East if the Islamic republic faced attacks launched from its Gulf neighbours' territory.

articles.title: Trump suggests he won’t end ceasefire with Iran even if talks are productive
articles.summary: Trump suggested he won't end the ceasefire with Iran. This is even if talks with Iran are productive. Iran war live updates: Trump suggests he won’t end ceasefire with Iran even if talks are productive MS NOW.

articles.title: Rape retrial hears Weinstein 'preyed' on aspiring US actress
articles.summary: Prosecutors in the New York retrial of Harvey Weinstein claim he preyed upon a young actress. The 2013 rape case against the former US filmmaker is being retried, with prosecutors presenting their case to the jury.

articles.title: US-Iran Talks Are In Doubt As Ceasefire Nears An End
articles.summary: The US-Iran ceasefire is set to expire, casting doubt on ongoing talks. The ceasefire was established after the US-Iran war broke out on February 28, but its terms are now under review.

articles.title: Two Palestinians Killed in Israeli Shooting Near West Bank School
articles.summary: Two Palestinians, including a child, were killed in an Israeli shooting near a West Bank school. The incident occurred in Al Mughayir, where clashes between Israeli settlers and locals have increased in recent times.

articles.title: 2 Americans Killed in Mexico Crash Were C.I.A. Members
articles.summary: Two CIA members were killed in a vehicle crash in Mexico's Chihuahua state. The Americans died on Sunday while returning from a counter-cartel operation led by Mexico's armed forces. The two Americans were killed on Sunday when their vehicle crashed while returning from a counter-cartel operation led by Mexico’s armed forces in the state of Chihuahua.

articles.title: Israeli Soldiers Sentenced to Jail for Damaging Jesus Statue in Lebanon
articles.summary: Israeli soldiers were jailed for damaging a Jesus statue in Lebanon. A statue of the crucifixion of Christ has been replaced after one soldier photographed another swinging what looked like a sledgehammer at its head.

articles.title: 'होर्मुज में अस्थिरता का भारत पर सीधा असर', जर्मनी में रक्षा मंत्री राजनाथ सिंह ने जताई चिंता
articles.summary: जर्मनी में रक्षा मंत्री राजनाथ सिंह ने कहा कि होर्मुज में अस्थिरता का भारत पर सीधा असर पड़ेगा। उन्होंने इस मुद्दे पर चिंता जताई। भारत के लिए यह एक महत्वपूर्ण चिंता का विषय है।

articles.title: 'खरगे ने सारी हदें पार कर दीं', पीएम पर विवादित बयान को लेकर शाह का कांग्रेस अध्यक्ष पर हमला
articles.summary: केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री अमित शाह ने कांग्रेस अध्यक्ष मल्लिकार्जुन खरगे पर हमला किया। खरगे के प्रधानमंत्री पर विवादित बयान को लेकर शाह ने कहा कि उन्होंने सारी हदें पार कर दी हैं। यह बयान राजनीतिक विवाद को बढ़ा रहा है।

articles.summary: सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद ने दिल्ली कैपिटल्स को हराकर अपने घरेलू मैदान पर जीत की हैट्रिक लगा ली है। अभिषेक शर्मा ने दमदार बल्लेबाजी की, जबकि ईशान मलिंगा और हर्ष दुबे गेंदबाजी में चमक बिखेरने में सफल हुए।

articles.summary: खाड़ी संघर्ष के कारण तारकोल के दाम दोगुने हो गए हैं। हिमाचल प्रदेश में सड़क की टारिंग पर ब्रेक लग गया है। Iran Israel war impact: खाड़ी संघर्ष से तारकोल के दाम दोगुने, हिमाचल प्रदेश में सड़क की टारिंग पर ब्रेक Amar Ujala।

articles.summary: भारत और जर्मनी मिलकर आधुनिक हथियार बनाने पर काम करेंगे। रक्षा मंत्री ने आत्मनिर्भर भारत के महत्व पर भी जोर दिया। जर्मनी दौरे पर राजनाथ सिंह: भारत-जर्मनी मिलकर बनाएंगे आधुनिक हथियार, आत्मनिर्भर भारत पर भी बोले रक्षा मंत्री।
